title: Compliance billing exception
description: Billing exception flagged by compliance: non-standard payment terms applied.

title: Payment reversal dispute
description: Customer disputed payment reversal. Billing and payments team reviewing transaction.

title: AML transaction monitoring alert
description: AML monitoring system raised alert on bulk cash transactions. Analyst reviewing.

title: Synthetic identity fraud
description: Onboarding data analysis revealed synthetic identity indicators. Fraud case escalated.

title: Audit: reconciliation controls
description: External audit reviewing reconciliation controls. Evidence gathering in progress.

title: KYC refresh compliance
description: Annual KYC refresh required. Customer compliance documentation needs updating.

title: Fraud velocity check failure
description: Transaction velocity exceeded fraud thresholds. Payments blocked pending review.

title: Billing statement error
description: Customer received incorrect billing statement. Payments applied to wrong account.
